## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Zuplo's contract renewal with GrowthX and address concerns about content strategy and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zuplo's leadership is questioning if GrowthX is the right fit for their current growth stage and content needs](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [There's a shift towards optimizing for AI/LLM answers rather than traditional SEO](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes a more aggressive, programmatic approach to content creation and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Both parties agree that a hybrid model (in-house + agency) could be ideal for Zuplo's needs](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)

## Topics

### Zuplo's Concerns with Current Strategy

  - [Leadership questioning if GrowthX is the right tool/team for Zuplo's current growth stage](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Investors pushing for focus on AI/LLM optimization over traditional SEO](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [5/5 recent self-serve customers came from ChatGPT, highlighting the importance of AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Concerns about the impact and ROI of work done so far (6-month timeframe initially discussed)](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Informational content not driving significant traffic relative to cost](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Shift in Content Strategy and Audience Engagement

  - [Developer audience requires more "show, don't tell" content with code snippets and practical examples](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [GrowthX acknowledges need for different approach, including:](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [More tailored instructions for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [Post-processing step for reviewing code samples](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
      - [Focus on synthesizing hard-to-find information from various sources](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### Proposed Solutions and New Approaches

  - [Create dedicated directories or microsites (e.g., CodeLibrary.ai) for more programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Shift focus from editorial to more aggressive, programmatic approaches (1000+ pages vs. 100)](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Leverage GrowthX's design and dev resources to build out new sections on Zuplo's site](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Explore partnerships with tools like Scrunch for better metrics and insights](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)

### Value of Agency Partnership in Evolving Landscape

  - [GrowthX can stress-test strategies across multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
  - [Ability to bring insights and traction from other clients to benefit Zuplo](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Flexibility to adjust approach and ensure Zuplo feels they're getting value](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to think more about proposed solutions and new approaches early next week](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=2011.0)
  - [Adrian to have a discussion with Zuplo's CEO about the partnership and proposed changes](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)
  - [Both parties to continue communication via Slack for any additional questions or concerns](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=2035.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare a more detailed proposal on how to adjust the strategy and engagement model](https://fathom.video/share/da4zyxyJPeZ5yz1r4ztj43GccyXuc9Le?tab=summary&timestamp=2011.0)
